steps.title: Write the total weight
steps.content:
The elevator carries the $180$-pound person, $x$ boxes at $24$ pounds each, and $y$ boxes at $58$ pounds each.
$$180+24x+58y$$

steps.title: Apply the maximum
steps.content:
The total weight must be at most $4{,}920$ pounds.
$$180+24x+58y\le4{,}920$$

steps.title: Isolate the box weight
steps.content: Subtract the person's weight from both sides. $$24x+58y\le4{,}920-180$$ $$24x+58y\le4{,}740$$ The answer is B.
